  "decision": "needs_more_info",
  "risk": "high",

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Bar size cannot be verified from a distant photo lacking scale reference and clear deformation pattern visibility."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Obtain close-up photos with a scale reference (e.g., ruler, tape measure) showing bar deformation patterns.",
    "Cross-reference bar marks or tags with placing drawings and mill certificates.",
    "If bars are already covered, request third-party inspection records or perform non-destructive testing (e.g., pachometer) to estimate bar size."
  ],
  "rationale": "ACI 117 and standard industry practice require verification of bar size against placing drawings. The provided photo lacks sufficient detail (no scale, no readable deformations) to confirm bar size compliance. Without this verification, structural integrity is uncertain, posing a high risk.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 117-10 (Specification for Tolerances for Concrete Construction and Materials)",
    "Placing drawings (project-specific)"
  ]
}
